title: verbascum pellitum
intro: Verbascum pellitum, also known as Hoary Mullein, is a biennial plant that belongs to the figwort family. The medicinal properties of Verbascum pellitum include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, ease respiratory issues, and aid in digestion. Verbascum pellitum can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or salve, allowing for various uses in natural remedies.
